label: Stat part (environmental effects)
description: Adjusts the stat based on roof and outdoor exposure, with an optional protection reduction from adjacent edifices.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factorOffsetUnroofed.label: Factor offset (unroofed)
factorOffsetUnroofed.description: Multiplier offset applied when the pawn or thing is in an unroofed tile.

factorOffsetOutdoors.label: Factor offset (outdoors)
factorOffsetOutdoors.description: Multiplier offset applied when the pawn or thing is outdoors.

protectedByEdificeFactor.label: Protected by edifice factor
protectedByEdificeFactor.description: Fraction by which nearby edifices reduce the outdoor exposure penalty.
